action.reasoning: Observation: Best config gets ~99 avg safe steps, need 500. Episodes often end early (89-210 steps). Some 750-step episodes get 130-210 safe steps. Analysis: Two problems: (1) early episode termination (collisions?), (2) not enough safe steps even in full episodes. The robot finds human at step 75-200, leaving only 550-675 steps for following. Need to understand why episodes end early and maximize safe following time. Decision: Run detailed diagnostic to understand early termination, then build much better controller that avoids collisions and maintains safe distance more consistently.
